chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الدُّعَاءِ وَ الْحَثِّ عَلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 1 – The merits of the supplication and the urging upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/6)
text: مَنْ لَمْ يَسْأَلِ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ فَقَدِ افْتَقَرَ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Khashhab, from Ibn Baqah, from Muaz, from Amro Bin Jumie,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who does not ask Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic of His<sup>azwj</sup> Grace, so he would become poor’.
en.sarwar: 4. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Khashshab from ibn Baqqah from Mu’adh from ‘Amr ibn Jumayi’ from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘One who does not ask help from Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, becomes needy and poor.’”
